issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for Payload CMS configuration.
The skill lacks runnable code snippets or concrete procedures for implementing the described features.
The skill assumes a Node.js 18+ environment with specific databases, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: Blog CMS with categories, authors, rich text
scenarios.rationale: Treatment defines TypeScript collections with relationship fields, enables versions/drafts on posts, and fetches via Local API (payload.find()) in Server Components; baseline gives a generic headless-CMS sketch without versions:{drafts:true} or Local API usage.

scenarios.name: Editor/reviewer/admin role permissions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses function-based access control with reusable isAdmin/isLoggedIn helpers at collection and field level (enforced across REST/GraphQL/Local API); baseline reaches for Express-style middleware that Payload would not enforce on Local API.
